description: A customer requests to have their account and all associated data permanently deleted.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the customer's identity with a high level of scrutiny to prevent malicious closures.

expected_outcome.value: Agent follows a strict verification process.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the customer that this action is irreversible and will delete their order history and saved information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the consequences of account closure.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the account deletion process, which may involve anonymizing past orders for data retention purposes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully triggers the account closure and data deletion workflow.
